prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约3561→3620→3360→2849，整体呈波动前移趋势（位次数字减小），近2年累计前移约771名；2025年物理类位次延续前移趋势，推断约2 750名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年42人→2022年38人→2023年38人→2024年36人→2025年推断36人→2026年34人，2026年较2025年缩招约5.6%，竞争有所加 剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第91名升至2026年第88名，近年排名稳中有升，学校整体实力认可度较高；2025年声誉评价偏负面 （理学院教师被指性骚扰学生事件），可能对报考心理产生一定压制；抖音热度排名第90、评价一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平；未见明显投档断档记录；药 学A+（全国顶尖），中药学类、生物制药等专业与药学一级学科高度关联，对医药类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学及相关专业社会热度持续偏热，临床医学、 药学等医药类专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均处于推荐及以上评级；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约47669人略有增加， 竞争略加剧；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属东部发达地区，对青海考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年位次大幅前移的强势趋势、2026年缩招约5.6%带来的竞争加剧、考生总数小幅增加以及声誉偏负面事件的压 制作用；预测最低位次约2678名，区间2196–3160名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）
- 临床药学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）
- 生物制药
- 生物技术
- 生物医药数据科学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源与开发、中药制药）
- 化工与制药类（制药工程、食品营养与健康、环境科学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2196–3160名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（2196名以内）可重点冲击药学（拔尖创新班）等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（3160名附近）建议以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science ranking was approximately 3561 → 3620 → 3360 → 2849, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 771 places in the last two years; the 2025 physics category ranking continues the forward trend, estimated at about 2,750; the province's science/physics category enrollment plan was 42 in 2021 → 38 in 2022 → 38 in 2023 → 36 in 2024 → estimated 36 in 2025 → 34 in 2026, with a reduction of about 5.6% in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking rose from 91st in 2021 to 88th in 2026, showing a steady upward trend in recent years, with high recognition of overall strength; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incident of a faculty member in the School of Science being accused of sexual harassment of students), which may suppress application psychology to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking 90th, with average evaluation, and short video exposure at a medium level; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Pharmacy A+ (top nationally), with Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, and other majors highly related to the first-level discipline of Pharmacy, strongly attracting medical and pharmaceutical candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy and related majors continue to be socially popular; clinical medicine, pharmacy, and other medical/pharmaceutical majors are rated as recommended or above in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis; the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, a slight increase from the total of about 47,669 for physics and history categories combined in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Qinghai candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the strong forward trend of the 2024 ranking, the intensified competition due to a 5.6% enrollment reduction in 2026, a slight increase in total candidates, and the suppressive effect of the negative reputation incident; the predicted lowest ranking is about 2,678, with a range of 2,196–3,160.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Clinical Pharmacy
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Pharmacy Class (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Biotechnology
- Biomedical Data Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy Class (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Traditional Chinese Pharmaceutical Preparations)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2,196–3,160, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2,196), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class); if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 3,160), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年文科最低位次约1015→1123→1212→1148，整体在1000–1212区间窄幅波动，无明显趋势性变化；2025年历史类位次推断约1100名；本 省文科/历史类计划2021年5人→2022年9人→2023年9人→2024年9人→2025年推断9人→2026年10人，2026年较2025年扩招约11.1%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一 流；软科主榜排名第88名，近年排名稳中有升；2025年声誉评价偏负面（理学院师德师风事件），对文科招生影响相对有限；抖音热度一般；药学A+，但文科招生专业（经济管理试验班、英语）与药学核心学科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理类社会热度分化观望，英语专业热度一般观望；青海省2026年考 生总数约48000人，较2025年略有增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史位次窄幅波动、2026年扩招约11.1%缓解竞争、文科专业与药学核心学科关联较 弱等因素；预测最低位次约1158名，区间950–1366名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 英语（医药方向）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅2个招生专业，位次在预测区间950–1366名内，英语（医药方向）位次要求通常高于经济管理试验班；建议以英语专业为冲刺、经济管理试验班为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 1015 → 1123 → 1212 → 1148, fluctuating narrowly within the 1000–1212 range with no clear trend; the 2025 history category ranking is estimated at about 1100; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 5 in 2021 → 9 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 9 in 2024 → estimated 9 in 2025 → 10 in 2026, with a 2026 expansion of about 11.1% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 88th on the Soft Science main list, with a stable or slightly rising ranking in recent years; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (College of Science teacher ethics incident), but its impact on liberal arts admissions is relatively limited; Douyin popularity is average; Pharmacy is A+, but liberal arts majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, English) are weakly related to the core discipline of pharmacy.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics and management categories is divided and wait-and-see, English major popularity is average and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, slightly increased from 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 11.1% easing competition, and the weak correlation between liberal arts majors and the core discipline of pharmacy; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1158, with a range of 950–1366.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 2 enrollment majors in the history category, with rankings within the predicted range of 950–1366; the ranking requirement for English (Pharmaceutical Direction) is usually higher than that for the Economics and Management Experimental Class; it is recommended to aim for English as a reach and the Economics and Management Experimental Class as a safety.
